evals.prompt: Generate steering documents for a NestJS + React + PostgreSQL task management SaaS. It has user auth, project management, task tracking, and team collaboration features. Deployed on AWS ECS.
evals.expected_output: Three files: product.md (features, users, workflows), tech.md (stack, patterns, services), structure.md (directory layout, module rules)

assertions.name: creates_product_md
assertions.description: product.md describes what the app does, who uses it, and key workflows

assertions.name: creates_tech_md
assertions.description: tech.md lists stack decisions, patterns, external services, and dev setup

assertions.name: creates_structure_md
assertions.description: structure.md shows directory layout and import rules

assertions.name: uses_project_config
assertions.description: References or reads project-config.md for stack details

assertions.name: concise_docs
assertions.description: Each doc is under 200 lines

evals.prompt: Our project has grown to 50K lines and new developers take a week to onboard. Create steering docs that give agents and developers instant context about the codebase.
evals.expected_output: Steering docs focused on reducing onboarding time — clear product overview, tech decisions with rationale, and navigable structure map

assertions.name: product_context
assertions.description: product.md explains what the product does in business terms

assertions.name: tech_rationale
assertions.description: tech.md explains WHY decisions were made, not just what was chosen

assertions.name: directory_navigation
assertions.description: structure.md enables finding code by feature, not by guessing

assertions.name: module_boundaries
assertions.description: Import rules prevent circular dependencies

assertions.name: scannable_format
assertions.description: Uses tables, bullet lists, and headers — not walls of text

evals.prompt: Generate steering docs for a Django + React Native mobile app for food delivery. Backend serves REST APIs, mobile app consumes them. Uses Stripe for payments, Google Maps for routing, and Firebase for push notifications.
evals.expected_output: Steering docs covering Django backend, React Native mobile, and all three external services

assertions.name: covers_both_platforms
assertions.description: tech.md covers both Django backend and React Native mobile

assertions.name: documents_external_services
assertions.description: Lists Stripe, Google Maps, and Firebase with how they're integrated

assertions.name: api_contract_reference
assertions.description: References the API contract between backend and mobile

assertions.name: structure_both_codebases
assertions.description: structure.md covers both backend and mobile directory layouts

assertions.name: environment_setup
assertions.description: tech.md includes how to set up both backend and mobile dev environments

evals.prompt: We're a microservices project with 4 NestJS services (user, order, product, notification) and a React frontend. Create steering docs that help agents understand which service owns what.
evals.expected_output: Steering docs with service ownership map, inter-service communication patterns, and per-service structure

assertions.name: service_ownership
assertions.description: product.md or tech.md maps which entities belong to which service

assertions.name: communication_patterns
assertions.description: tech.md documents how services communicate (REST, events, gRPC)

assertions.name: per_service_structure
assertions.description: structure.md covers directory layout for each of the 4 services

assertions.name: frontend_api_mapping
assertions.description: Documents which frontend pages call which backend services

assertions.name: no_cross_import_rules
assertions.description: Import rules prevent services from importing each other's code directly

evals.prompt: Update existing steering docs after we added a new AI features service (Python/FastAPI) to our NestJS monorepo. The AI service calls Claude API for content generation and has its own PostgreSQL database.
evals.expected_output: Updated steering docs adding the AI service to tech.md and structure.md without breaking existing content

assertions.name: updates_not_rewrites
assertions.description: Adds AI service info without removing existing content

assertions.name: documents_ai_service
assertions.description: tech.md includes Python/FastAPI stack, Claude API integration

assertions.name: updates_structure
assertions.description: structure.md adds the AI service directory layout

assertions.name: cross_service_communication
assertions.description: Documents how the NestJS services call the AI service

assertions.name: separate_database
assertions.description: Notes that the AI service has its own database
